query:
ALTER TABLE notebooks 
ADD COLUMN downloadCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN viewCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN contactPhone VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN isFreeDownload BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ocoPq9UKt9MVUJb.root --database cF5vY7QXosm6HAcTf29xyM --execute ALTER TABLE notebooks 
ADD COLUMN downloadCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN viewCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN contactPhone VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN isFreeDownload BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL;
